title: pkg-core-only
description: The unknown-name policy LOCK at the corpus level (M4 item 8 / §5.4). A \usepackage{longtable} document: longtable.sty ships in core, but 'longtable' is NOT a provided-package name in ANY tier's manifest 'provides' index (it comes from the 'tools' package). So the §5.4(a) scan resolves it to nothing and does nothing; core serves longtable.sty; the first pass succeeds; the missing-file retry never fires. Proves a core-served \usepackage must NOT pull the ~472 MB academic tier (bundlesLoaded=['core'], resolution=none). This is the public-API corpus counterpart to the runtime integration test's longtable case.
